## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] One change per PR (atomic > monolithic)
- [ ] No new dependencies (stdlib only)
- [ ] If changing skill/profile behavior, handoff contract is documented
- [ ] Syntax verified: `python3 -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile('file.py')"`
